BUTTERFLY.title: Butterfly
BUTTERFLY.description:
A state that triggers a specific effect when you deal damage, then reduces stacks by [blue]1[/blue].
Divided into [green]Soul Butterfly[/green], [purple]Death Butterfly[/purple], and [blue]Spirit Butterfly[/blue].
SUMMON_BUTTERFLY.title: Summon Butterfly X
ETHEREAL.title: Ethereal
ETHEREAL.description: If this card is still in your hand at the end of your turn, it is removed from combat.
SPRING.title: Spring
SPRING.description:
At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Death Wish[/gold] equal to the stack count to all enemies, then trigger extra effects based on the stacks:
[blue]9[/blue]+: Randomly [gold]Summon Butterfly[/gold] 1/2 of stacks.
[blue]19[/blue]+: Apply 1/4 of stacks [gold]Demise[/gold] to all enemies.
[blue]29[/blue]+: Enhance all [gold]Butterfly[/gold] effects.
[blue]49[/blue]+: Put 1/10 of stacks [gold]Falling Cherry[/gold] into your hand.
[blue]74[/blue]+: [gold]Death Wish[/gold] stacks no longer decrease.
[blue]99[/blue]+: [gold]Death Wish[/gold] stacks will instead increase by [blue]66%[/blue].
